settings.title: How your cake travels
settings.panel_body:
Every cake gets packed by hand the morning it ships. Here's the whole job:

  • Baked fresh. Frozen solid. We freeze it the night before so it travels cold and arrives at peak.
  • Wrapped, sealed, set in an insulated liner with gel ice packs. The box is built for the journey.
  • A card from me goes in every box. Serving and storage on the back. A freshness seal you'll know hasn't been touched.
  • 2-Day Air, climate-controlled. Cake doesn't sit in a truck wondering where it's going.

Made on 75th Street with love, packed cold, shipped to your door.

settings.title: When your cake arrives
settings.panel_body:
When the box hits your porch, give the cake a few minutes of care and it'll be perfect.

Open right away — even if you're not eating cake today. Seal should be intact. Cake will be cold, maybe a little frozen. That's how I want it. Take it out of the liner, slip it in the fridge.

Pull it out of the fridge 30 to 45 minutes before you serve it. Room temperature is when it sings — that's when the caramel really comes through. Don't leave it on the counter overnight.

Cutting and storing. Clean knife, wipe it between slices. Leftovers go back in the fridge in an airtight container — they'll hold seven days, and you can freeze slices for a month.

Questions when your cake gets there? Call us at (773) 570-7676. We answer.

settings.title: Before you order
settings.teaser: A few honest things to know.
settings.panel_body:
I want you to know what shipping can and can't do before you click order. Three honest things:

No cake writing on shipped cakes. Lettering doesn't survive a 2-day journey. If you want "Happy Birthday" piped on the cake, that's a local pickup conversation.

No exact delivery hour. UPS gives us the day, not the minute. Plan to be home or have a neighbor watching the porch.

Not every flavor ships. I've kept the shipping menu to what I know travels beautifully. If you want something that isn't on the list, call me first — we'll figure out what's possible.

Questions? Call (773) 570-7676 or email shipping@brownsugarbakery.com. We answer.
